assessment_objectives.objective: personnel receive recurring familiarization with the organization's cybersecurity / data privacy policies.

a documented acknowledgement from individuals indicating that they have read, understand, and agree to abide by the rules of behavior is received before authorizing access to sensitive / regulated data and the system.
a documented acknowledgement from individuals indicating that they have read, understand, and agree to abide by the rules of behavior is received before authorizing access to CUI and the system.
